name: Business Meeting
description:
"We have business to do, this isn't a date.."

Oh, that’s cute. Two people in formal attires sitting together at a table. It’s like they’re on a date. That’s what it seems like to Justin (the left). He doesn’t like how it appears you’re on a romantic occasion with him when you’re supposed to be dealing with a target. It turns out you’re there with him on an attempt to assassinate him, as he’s gotten on the nerves of your boss. And guess what? He’s fully aware of that. Art by [@maggotnizer] (⭐)
creator: shokokokok
